codeReview.summary: The fix closes the remaining XML-safety gap: Claude/Hermes now XML-escape key-file and key-command bullets before they enter the `<context_pack>` envelope, and the new regression tests cover XML-sensitive fixtures.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The new XML-sensitive key-files/key-commands regression is only present as a local test addition and is not reflected in the mission validation contract, so future validation guidance will not explicitly call it out.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `validation-contract.md` has no `VAL-CTXEXP-014` or key-files/key-commands XML-safety assertion; the new coverage appears in `AgentLensTests/Active/ContextPackExportTests.swift:471-570`.

summary: Pass: Claude/Hermes ContextPack envelopes now escape key-file and key-command content, and the regression tests cover XML-sensitive fixtures.
